title: Picky Bags
description: Picky Bags : they pickup and sort items for you keeping the inventory clean.  Also has a Lunchbox
body:
Tired of picking up stuff?





Have you ever wanted to carry around bags that pickup stuff FOR YOU



Whenever you pickup an item, if you are holding one of these magical bags, they get sorted into the bag based on what kind of item it is. Its like the bag pickup items for you. 

Right-click the bag while in your inventory to open the bags

You can quick-insert items into the bags, assuming they match the item type



 [https://i.imgur.com/j4moFNT.gif](https://i.imgur.com/j4moFNT.gif)





Forester's Collection Bag

- Picks up wood, logs, saplings, tree related items

- Data tag 'pickybags:wood_like'



Digger's Collection Bag

- Picks up digging related material

- Data tag 'pickybags:stone_like'



Gardener's Collection Bag

- Picks up crops, seeds, and flowers

- Data tag 'pickybags:plant_like'



Miner's Collection Bag

- this one collects the gems, dusts, ingots, and ores you are collecting

- Data tag 'pickybags:gem_like'





Lunchbox

- Auto pickup any item that is edible (so no data tag used here)

- you have to sneak-click (shift-click) to open this one, because normally it tries to EAT the contents

- eating the bag while its closed eats the first item it finds in the bag



Also adds a few items that do not have the auto-pickup feature, but are still useful



Crafting Slab

- handheld item-only crafting 3x3 grid, supports all recipes. no need to place a table down



Item Bag

- Simple handheld storage, holds a double-chests worth so more than regular bags, but no auto pickup or any fancy features.

- to store all the excess junk









All controlled by data tags, so modpacks can edit this pickup list at willl, see https://github.com/Lothrazar/pickybags/tree/trunk/1.20/src/main/resources/data/pickybags/tags/items











Requires forge and FLIB
